pr.title: feat(ui): /family action-first redesign (Figma Manage Family V2)

receipt.goal: Replace the existing signed-in `/family` UI with the local Figma Manage Family V2 action-first hierarchy, preserving children + per-child saved stats + gift-share plumbing.
decisions_made: Did not port pack mock quick-add/inventory drawer flows (no matching inventory backend plumbing found); Quick add navigates to Discover instead.
Renamed `ChildProfilesSection` prop from `children` to `familyChildren` to satisfy `react/no-children-prop` lint.
verification_steps: Lint/TS: `pnpm exec eslint` on modified `/family` components.
receipt.rollback_plan: Revert/close the PR and switch back to `main` (no DB/schema changes were made).
